message:
feat(stdlib): Add check_warnings context manager to warnings_helper

Implements the test.support.warnings_helper.check_warnings context
manager as a no-op struct. This enables tests that use the warnings
capture infrastructure to compile.

Tests passing: bool, float, format, fractions, keyword, longexp, softspace,
syntax, unary, binop, int_literal, iterlen, global (14 total)
